text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky runs in the Radio Nikkei Sho during
camp, and wins an outstanding victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Maruzensky returns to camp, she is greeted
by an ecstatic Special Week, who has watched
the live broadcast of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is pleased to see that her
participation in the race has had a positive effect
on the younger athletes.
